entities.name: jetbrains-index

activation.configSource: Pi settings.json (jetbrainsIndex key) with mcp.json fallback

behaviors: Injects IDE tool prompt guidelines into system prompt Guidelines section (prefer IDE tools over bash/rg/find, tool-specific usage guidance, CWD restriction)
Loads JetBrains connection config from Pi settings.json (jetbrainsIndex key) with fallback to mcp.json
Blocks any tool call when IDE/index becomes unavailable and aborts the agent run
Syncs entire project at turn start and reports only newly introduced diagnostics
Nudges toward IDE move refactoring on mv/git mv inside CWD
Exposes internal JetBrainsService layer (transport, catalog, indexing lifecycle) and standalone response-formatting module for TOON/payload/error helpers
Provides target-resolution module (target-resolver.ts) that resolves symbol or location targets to canonical file/line/column for semantic tool wrappers

Registers first-class Pi wrapper tools (14 tools) on session start when IDE is available: ide_find_file, ide_search_text, ide_find_symbol, ide_find_definition, ide_find_references, ide_rename_symbol, ide_rename_file, ide_find_implementations, ide_find_super_methods, ide_type_hierarchy, ide_call_hierarchy, ide_diagnostics, ide_move_file, ide_file_structure
Mutation tools (ide_rename_symbol, ide_rename_file, ide_move_file) perform one whole-project sync after successful IDE mutation and do not run diagnostics
